digital_rain_t(3) Library Functions Manual digital_rain_t(3)

NAME

digital_rain_t - Digital rain effect context.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/anim/digital_rain.h>

Data Fields


digital_rain_column_t * columns
Per-column state array. int num_columns
Number of columns in grid. int num_rows
Number of rows in grid. float time
Current simulation time (accumulated). float fall_speed
Base fall speed multiplier. float raindrop_length
Length of each raindrop (in cells). float brightness_decay
Brightness smoothing factor (0-1). float animation_speed
Overall animation speed multiplier. uint8_t color_r
Matrix green R component. uint8_t color_g
Matrix green G component. uint8_t color_b
Matrix green B component. float cursor_brightness
Cursor brightness multiplier. bool rainbow_mode
True if rainbow color cycling is enabled. bool first_frame
True if this is the first frame. float * previous_brightness
Previous frame brightness (for smoothing).

Detailed Description

Digital rain effect context.

Maintains state for the entire digital rain effect across frames. Tracks column states and effect parameters.

Definition at line 71 of file digital_rain.h.
